title: The Beat of Emotions
overview: An ideal society managed by Sapotamas. Underneath, terrifying creatures called Digimon appear. After a classmate is attacked, Tomoro Tenma's emotions explode. Suddenly his Sapotama shines and Gekkomon is born.

title: Glowing Dawn
overview: Gekkomon is awakened by Tomoro's anger and overwhelms his enemy. Just then, a mysterious Digimon steals their Sapotama. With his brother lost, Tomoro shuts down emotionally, until he is shocked by what the leader of the "Glowing Dawn" has to say.

title: Facing Mirrors
overview: Upon learning that the bounty intel is wrong, Tomoro and Gekkomon follow the scent of his own e-Pulse. There they find the Mirror World, a virtual space inside the net. Inside the Sapotama that glows within Hyemon…

title: Family
overview: Reina is in high spirits after being handed leadership for the next job by Kyo. But, because of Tomoro's mistake, the Machmon bounty escapes. Rookie member Tomoro can't understand Reina's obsession with the Glowing Dawn being a family.

title: Half and Half
overview: Tomoro wanders into an old shopping district where he witnesses the Panda-gumi protecting the town from thugs. Their leader Sasatake and Pandamon have a bond of father and child. Meanwhile, Yuukari of the Koala-kai prepares to evict the residents.

title: The Bond of Parent and Child
overview: Pandamon is furious that Yuukari has hurt the boss but is conflicted between their feelings and teachings about chivalry. Tomoro wants to challenge Astamon in battle. Meanwhile, Kyo investigates the identity of the mastermind.

title: Nirinso
overview: Tomoro and the others find hikers who’ve nearly fallen victim to Cold Heart. They are saved by an exhausted Kyo and Murasamemon. Deep in the mountain is an old observatory that holds Kyo’s secret.

title: The Vanishing Classroom
overview: Hitomi takes Tomoro to school to investigate a series of student disappearances. Only the top students are going missing. Gekkomon struggles to rescue Tomoro when he's trapped inside Mimicmon.

title: Utopia
overview: Going after a bounty, the Glowing Dawn infiltrate Shangri-La Egg, a utopia created after a massive disaster. There, other Cleaners who are also after Goldnumemon appear in front of Tomoro and the others...

title: A True Friend
overview: Chiropmon is taken from Makoto by Haruko, who sees Digimon as toys. Kyo tries to interrupt the buyer’s transaction, while Makoto feels troubled because his own weakness caused Chiropmon to suffer.

title: A Black Emotion
overview: While out buying a birthday present for Asuka, Tomoro gets into a fight with Gekkomon over picking a scarf. Separated from Tomoro, the sulking Gekkomon encounters a Digimon who emits poisonous gas.

title: A New Family
overview: Tomoro regrets that Kyo and Gekkomon got hurt because of him and faces his job as a Cleaner once more. Meanwhile, a Digimon with an abnormal e-Pulse heads towards the Glowing Dawn’s headquarters.

title: Five Star Meeting
overview: The Five Stars, who stand at the top of the Cleaner world, gather for a meeting. The topic is the increase in Cold Heart incidents and emerging disaster-class Digimon. Meanwhile, Tomoro and the others encounter a strange trio at a crime site.

title: Tactics
overview: The Tactics are Cleaner teams that undergo rigorous training to perfect e-Pulse control. The Glowing Dawn members face off against them over a bounty, but Tomoro can't accept their methods.

title: Little Courage
overview: The Kinoko Gang, holding a grudge, sneak into Nirinso while Kyo is away, aiming to destroy the Glowing Dawn. Redvegimon paralyzes Gekkomon and the others, while the In-Training Digimon can only watch…

title: Where I Belong
overview: Granit’s interference causes Reina to let her target escape, and they are both taken to a cold, snowy mountain by Moosemon. While they look for clues to go back, Granit recalls the birth of Ludomon.

title: Antipathy
overview: While pursuing a Koemon, the Glowing Dawn encounter the Tactics. Hotaruko's siblings mistake Makoto for her coworker and invite them for okonomiyaki. Hotaruko becomes hostile towards them, but there's an issue of food theft in town…

title: The Price of Freedom
overview: Tomoro and the others treat a man who collapsed outside their headquarters to stew, but then the Tactics demand they hand him over. While they try to stop the Tactics, Commandramon is taken away. The man shares his dark past.

title: Black Market Auction
overview: Tomoro and the others infiltrate an illegal Digimon auction held by Five Star member Klay Arslan. While investigating the venue which is being guarded by Tactics, they find a girl and her Tinkermon locked in a cage.

title: Proof of Genius
overview: Tomoro gets kidnapped by a monkey Digimon and wakes up in an arena inside the Mirror World, where Digimon Owners are forced to fight. After Tomoro wins his first match, his next opponent appears to be Raito.

title: The One Beside You
overview: The members of Glowing Dawn rush to Tomoro’s aid. Tomoro descends beneath the colosseum to rescue Raito who was taken away. Naito and his team intercept Kyo, but Reina suddenly notices something wrong with Granit…

title: Defiance
overview: Naito relentlessly targets Kyo to fulfill Klay’s wish. Meanwhile, Hotaruko is troubled by her orders to eliminate the traitor. Then, the Five Stars Star of Water, Honoka the Abyssal appears and declares that she has come to hunt down the Tactics.

title: The Power to Take
overview: Tomoro and the others head to the colosseum to rescue those who've been Cold-Hearted. Klay makes preparations to fulfill his ambition, while Kyo and Murasamemon confront Proganomon who is surrounded by mysterious light...

title: Overlapping Beats
overview: Tomoro fights Klay to save Kyo, but he’s helpless against Klay’s overwhelming power, and his family gets injured. Consumed by his anger, Tomoro becomes reckless. Then, the genius he once defeated shows up…

title: Half-Baked Hero
overview: Tomoro and the others take a short vacation on a luxury cruise ship, where they meet popular entertainers Handa and Starmon. To Makoto and Chiropmon, Handa is a legendary Cleaner. When pirates attack the ship, Starmon takes them on…

title: The Taste of Guilt
overview: Haruomi is found collapsed outside Nirinso. Rescued by Kyo, he is reunited with Commandramon and then runs into a weakened Elizamon. On Gekkomon’s suggestion, the two Digimon settle their battle to be Haruomi’s partner through a cooking competition.

title: Wandering Love
overview: Hitomi runs into Tomoro after a long time, but she’s acting strange. Due to a mysterious wrapping on her arm, Tomoro and the others begin showing strong affection for their Digimon. The Digimon escape and ask Maki for help…

title: GIFT
overview: Tomoro meets a mysterious girl while visiting Asuka. Meanwhile, the Glowing Dawn head to the hospital to catch a serial killer. There, they find a Digimon with a strange interest in deliveries, and an Owner infatuated with Digimon.
